url.description: Public URL of your Ghost instance (e.g., https://your-app.up.railway.app). Required for proper asset serving.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Add a Railway Postgres service to auto-inject.

mail__transport.description: Mail transport method: direct, smtp, mailgun, or sendmail. Use 'smtp' for transactional email.

MAIL_OPTIONS_AUTH_PASS.description: SMTP password for authentication. Auto-generated — replace with your real SMTP credentials.
